groupings.title: Core HR
groupings.description: Core HR operations, employee lifecycle, compliance, payroll, compensation, wellbeing, and day-to-day HR management.

groupings.title: People Strategy
groupings.description: Strategic HR, HR business partnering, workforce planning, talent, leadership, organization development, and people analytics.

groupings.title: Recruiting
groupings.description: Talent acquisition, interviewing, employer branding, and job description creation.

groupings.title: Technical Recruiting
groupings.description: Hiring guides for software engineering, AI, data, design, infrastructure, security, and QA roles.

groupings.title: Regional
groupings.description: Country-specific HR regulations, labor law, and employment practices.
